subject: docs(session): update CSS comment, add em rule, rewrite session notes and history
body:
- Updated .md-render CSS comment block to reference marked library
  instead of the deleted regex parser
- Added .md-render em rule for marked's <em> output (explicit over
  relying on browser default italic)
- Rewrote docs/SESSION_NOTES.md with current session context
- Added 2026-04-05 entry to docs/HISTORY.md documenting the markdown
  parser replacement, root cause of truncation, and new architecture
